sections.paragraph: m. ־ִיָּה and ־ִית f. adj. lower, lowest, Psa 86:13 Job 41:16 Gen 6:16. תַּחְתִּיֹּות־אֶרֶץ the lower, lowest parts of the earth, Hades, Isa 44:23 poet. used of a hidden place (here of the womb of the mother [but it is the formation of the members of Christ’s mystical body]), Psa 139:15 the same is אֶרֶץ־תַּחְתִּיֹּות Eze 26:20 32:18 , 24 Eze 32:24, compare בֹּור תַּחְתִּיֹּות the deepest pit, Psa 81:7 Lam 3:55.
